concepts.title: The {Family} Family
concepts.subtitle: {Year} Reunion
concepts.creativeExplanation: We made “grandparents.jpg” (portrait, quality 85/100) the star. Photo f1 (grandparents.jpg) is strongest: portrait, score 85, 2 subjects. Signature Edition centers it with organic balance and warm-generous whitespace, framed with restraint in #C9A84C on #0C0E14 — timeless, so this family reunion still feels right in ten years. 4 supporting photos were chosen only because they strengthen the hero and lead the eye back to it — beauty over quantity, nothing added for its own sake. Everything serves one feeling: warmth. Gather generations in warmth and belonging.
concepts.purchasePsychology: The version most families choose — timeless and universally loved. A natural centerpiece for a family reunion. Recommended as a Framed. Made for the extended family. (family reunion)

layoutRecipe.arrangement: Central hero with a disciplined supporting grid

colorRecipe.guidance: Restrained gold on obsidian; refined, high-contrast, timeless. Gold as a hairline accent only.

typographyRecipe.headlineTreatment: elegant Cormorant Garamond display, high contrast, one headline
typographyRecipe.guidance: Classic, confident hierarchy; distance- and print-readable.

sharePreview.headline: Gather generations in warmth and belonging.
sharePreview.caption: I can’t believe this came from our photos. 😮
sharePreview.altText: A Signature Edition CelebrateBanner family reunion design, centered on the chosen hero photo with 4 supporting photos.

concepts.title: The {Family} Family
concepts.subtitle: {Year} Reunion
concepts.creativeExplanation: We made “grandparents.jpg” (portrait, quality 85/100) the star. Photo f1 (grandparents.jpg) is strongest: portrait, score 85, 2 subjects. Luxury Gold lifts it into a cinematic spotlight with luxurious negative space and gold framing in #C9A84C, so the family reunion feels as big as it was. 4 supporting photos were chosen only because they strengthen the hero and lead the eye back to it — beauty over quantity, nothing added for its own sake. Everything serves one feeling: warmth. Gather generations in warmth and belonging.
concepts.purchasePsychology: Best displayed as a framed keepsake; the gold reads richest at a large size, so it looks strongest at 24×36. Recommended as a Framed. Made for the extended family. (family reunion)

layoutRecipe.arrangement: Dramatic spotlighted hero with luxurious negative space

colorRecipe.guidance: Gold-forward on deep obsidian with glow accents on the hero — radiant metallic, never flooded.

typographyRecipe.headlineTreatment: large Cormorant Garamond in gold gradient
typographyRecipe.guidance: Formal and radiant; the most decorative type voice, still restrained.

concepts.creativeExplanation: We made “grandparents.jpg” (portrait, quality 85/100) the star. Photo f1 (grandparents.jpg) is strongest: portrait, score 85, 2 subjects. Family Legacy arranges the memories as a warm story — anchor moments, then story builders — with room around every face, honoring the family reunion across time. 4 supporting photos were chosen only because they strengthen the hero and lead the eye back to it — beauty over quantity, nothing added for its own sake. Everything serves one feeling: warmth. Gather generations in warmth and belonging.

colorRecipe.guidance: Warm layer within the brand core; soft, unifying, nostalgic. Gold used as gentle detail.

typographyRecipe.guidance: Heartfelt, legible; room to breathe around names.

concepts.title: The {Family} Family
concepts.subtitle: {Year} Reunion
concepts.creativeExplanation: We made “grandparents.jpg” (portrait, quality 85/100) the star. Photo f1 (grandparents.jpg) is strongest: portrait, score 85, 2 subjects. Modern Editorial gives it magazine-cover scale and deliberate asymmetry, with bold negative space and strong type — the family reunion, styled like a cover. 4 supporting photos were chosen only because they strengthen the hero and lead the eye back to it — beauty over quantity, nothing added for its own sake. Everything serves one feeling: warmth. Gather generations in warmth and belonging.
concepts.purchasePsychology: Made to share — it looks strongest on a phone screen and social feed before it ever reaches a wall. Recommended as a Digital download. Made for the extended family. (family reunion)

layoutRecipe.arrangement: Editorial asymmetry with an oversized hero

colorRecipe.guidance: Sharpest contrast, a single disciplined accent; gold as highlight only.

typographyRecipe.labelTreatment: bold sans labels; refined serif accent
typographyRecipe.guidance: Type as composition; strong scale contrast, magazine-grade.
